summary: A high-specification, contemporary bathroom presented in a very good structural and decorative condition. The marble and ceramic tiling are clean with minimal wear, though there are minor water marks and dust on some surfaces. Several fixtures, including the shower screen seal and vanity basin, show light residue or limescale build-up requiring domestic cleaning.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth plaster ceiling emulsioned in matte white.

items.name: Walls
items.description: A combination of large-format white rectangular glazed ceramic tiles (above the bath), polished dark grey/black marble-effect tiles with white veining, and light grey emulsioned plaster walls.
defects: Faint grey rub marks to emulsioned wall at eye to mid level as shown in close-up photo P012
Light water spots and faint smudging to glazed tiling above bath shown in P019

items.name: Flooring
items.description: Polished dark grey/black marble-effect porcelain floor tiles with white veining and light grey grout lines.

items.name: Door
items.description: White painted timber flush door with matching frame and architraves, fitted with modern matte black lever handle and latch/lock mechanism.
defects: Light finger-marking and dust to the black handle surfaces shown in P013

items.name: Bathtub
items.description: White acrylic rectangular built-in bathtub with integrated overflow and clicker waste, framed with a matching dark marble tiled bath panel.

items.name: Bath Shower Screen
items.description: Frameless clear glass hinged shower screen with chrome brackets and a translucent plastic bottom drip seal.
defects: Noticeable brown grime, discolouration, and limescale build-up along the interior of the plastic bottom seal as shown in P017

items.name: Bath Tapware & Shower Kit
items.description: Chrome-plated wall-mounted dual circular controls, wall-mounted riser rail with height slider, metallic flexible hose, and round multi-spray handset by Zucchetti.
defects: Limescale build-up between the coils of the metallic shower hose as shown in close-up P021
Water marks and light scale build-up around the edges of the wall-mounted chrome controls in P020
Minor scale marks to the face of the shower handset in P022

items.name: Vanity Unit & Basin
items.description: Wall-hung double solid-surface vanity unit in white matte, featuring a deep integrated rectangular sink bowl, fitted with a deck-mounted curved black metal mixer tap.
defects: Layer of light dust, water markings, and minor lint on the flat solid-surface vanity countertop in P024
Accumulated dust and light grime in the corner joint where vanity meets the marble wall tile in P025

items.name: Mirrored Wall Cabinets
items.description: Large multi-section wall cabinet with three mirrored glass doors, oak-effect laminate interior shelving, integrated vertical LED strip lights, and an integrated round backlit magnifying mirror.

items.name: Toilet
items.description: White ceramic wall-hung toilet pan (Geberit) with matching white plastic seat and lid, accompanied by a wall-mounted matte black circular dual flush plate.

items.name: Heated Towel Rail
items.description: Wall-mounted ladder-style heated towel rail with flat rectangular chrome-plated horizontal bars.

items.name: Robe Hooks
items.description: Cylindrical brushed metal robe hooks wall-mounted to the emulsioned plaster wall.

items.name: Digital Bathroom Scales
items.description: Freestanding digital bathroom scale with a light green/clear tempered glass platform.

items.name: Bath Mat
items.description: Woven cotton rectangular bath mat featuring a black and white checkerboard design.

items.name: Recessed Toilet Roll Holder
items.description: Chrome-plated metal toilet roll holder recessed into the tiled wall next to the toilet.
defects: Light smudges and fingerprint marks on polished chrome frame surfaces in P031

items.name: Toilet Brush & Pedal Bin
items.description: Freestanding bathroom set consisting of a black handle toilet brush in a brushed stainless steel holder, and a matching small brushed stainless steel pedal bin.

items.name: Air Extract Vent
items.description: Ceiling-mounted circular white plastic extractor fan grille.

items.name: Spotlights
items.description: Recessed ceiling downlight spotlight fixtures with round white metal trim.
